name: UnifiedAPI
description: Represents a unified API aggregation layer that exposes multiple underlying provider APIs through a single normalized interface.

name.description: Name of the unified API platform.

description.description: Description of what the unified API covers.
description.example: Unified API for syncing employee data across BambooHR, Workday, ADP, and 50+ other HR systems.

category.description: Business category covered by the unified API.

providers.description: List of underlying API providers aggregated by this unified API.

base_url.description: Base URL of the unified API.

authentication.description: Authentication mechanism for the unified API.

normalized_schema.description: Whether the API normalizes response schemas across all underlying providers.
